ground_truth.title: Headphones - Buy Authentic Products at the Official JBL Shop
ground_truth.main_content: ROCK YOUR WORLD. When you hear your top tracks with JBL's signature sound and noise-cancelling tech—you'll keep adding more to your queue. Over-Ear Headphones: From big and bold to cool and compact—find the shape that fits your listening style with our selection of over-ear headphones. On-Ear Headphones: From big and bold to cool and compact, find the perfect on-ear headphones to match your style at the official JBL shop. Discover authentic sound today. Kids' Headphones: Safe, lightweight, and sized for kids, JBL headphones deliver legendary sound and fun for young music fans. Perfect for their listening needs! Refurbished Headphones: Refurbished In-Ear, Over-Ear, Sport, True Wireless, Bluetooth, Noise-Cancelling, Wireless & Wired Headphones. Wired Headphones: Wired headphones for crystal-clear sound, just plug & play! Discover authentic quality at the official JBL shop.
with: Experience JBL's signature sound with noise-cancelling tech for an immersive listening experience.
